title: La`dan #3936
definition:
Laadan = "put in order"

 1) an Ephraimite ancestor of Joshua, son of Nun
 2) a Levite son of Gershom; also 'Libni'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Laadan = "put in order"

 1) an Ephraimite ancestor of Joshua, son of Nun
 2) a Levite son of Gershom; also 'Libni'

    NASB:  an Ephraimite, also a Gershonite
